pages.text: Each Ancient Guardian leaves behind a $(l)100%-guaranteed essence$() upon defeat. These essences are progression currencies — they cannot be crafted, only earned through combat.$(br2)$(l)Warden Essence$() — from Elemental Warden$(br)$(l)Weaver Essence$() — from Void Weaver$(br)$(l)Avatar Essence$() — from Transcendence Avatar

$(l)Transcendence Proof$() — the ultimate certificate.$(br2)$(l)Recipe$() (shapeless):$(br)1 Warden Essence + 1 Weaver Essence + 1 Avatar Essence + 1 Aether Ingot + 1 Transcendence Core + 1 Refined Magic Crystal = 1 Transcendence Proof$(br2)Holding a Proof grants $(l)+10% damage to all transcend spells$() and $(l)passive Regeneration I$() while in your hotbar.$(br2)Proof of having walked the path to its end.
